currentTaskState.activeTask: Verifying summaryTrace structure: included, omitted, uncertain arrays

acceptedDecisions.content: summaryTrace is mandatory and must have all three categories even if empty

openIssues.content: Whether to surface uncertain items to the main model as warnings — deferred

warnings.content: Do not conflate summaryTrace.uncertain with failOpen — they are separate concepts

recentRelevantTurns.content: Reviewer confirmed: summaryTrace.uncertain is essential for fail-open auditability

uncertain: openIssues — could not determine if still relevant after compression
